# Shrink

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Shrink icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="Shrink" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; 4.2V9m0 0H4.2M9 9 3 3&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-preview" RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Shrink;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Shrink { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
scale, fullscreen

## Categories
layout, arrows

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/shrink)
